query:
SELECT 
  m.remoteJid,
  m.fromMe AS lastFromMe,
  m.status AS lastMsgStatus,
  wc.lastStatus AS wcLastStatus,
  wc.lastFromMe AS wcLastFromMe,
  LEFT(m.content, 50) AS preview
FROM messages m
INNER JOIN (
  SELECT remoteJid, sessionId, MAX(id) AS maxId
  FROM messages
  WHERE sessionId LIKE 'crm-%'
  AND remoteJid NOT LIKE '%@g.us'
  AND remoteJid != 'status@broadcast'
  GROUP BY remoteJid, sessionId
) latest ON m.remoteJid = latest.remoteJid AND m.id = latest.maxId AND m.sessionId = latest.sessionId
LEFT JOIN wa_conversations wc ON wc.remoteJid = m.remoteJid AND wc.sessionId = m.sessionId
WHERE m.fromMe = 1
ORDER BY m.id DESC
LIMIT 15

SELECT 
  m.remoteJid,
  m.fromMe AS lastFromMe,
  m.status AS lastMsgStatus,
  wc.lastStatus AS wcLastStatus,
  wc.lastFromMe AS wcLastFromMe,
  LEFT(m.content, 50) AS preview
FROM messages m
INNER JOIN (
  SELECT remoteJid, sessionId, MAX(id) AS maxId
  FROM messages
  WHERE sessionId LIKE 'crm-%'
  AND remoteJid NOT LIKE '%@g.us'
  AND remoteJid != 'status@broadcast'
  GROUP BY remoteJid, sessionId
) latest ON m.remoteJid = latest.remoteJid AND m.id = latest.maxId AND m.sessionId = latest.sessionId
LEFT JOIN wa_conversations wc ON wc.remoteJid = m.remoteJid AND wc.sessionId = m.sessionId
WHERE m.fromMe = 1
ORDER BY m.id DESC
LIMIT 15
